prose: Fukui reactivity indices for acrolein (8 atoms: O, C, C, C, H, H, H, H) computed at the DFT level using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied .xyz (not re-optimized). Cation: charge +1, doublet; anion: charge −1, doublet. Partial charges via Mulliken partitioning. The headline value reported is the maximum f⁺ index (electrophilic susceptibility), located at C4 (the β-carbon, terminal alkene carbon): f⁺ = 0.64232102. The most nucleophilic site (f⁻) is O1 (f⁻ = 0.39389). The dual descriptor confirms C4 (+0.55495) as the dominant Michael acceptor. All integrity checks passed: Σf⁺ = 1.0000, Σf⁻ = 1.0000. No warnings were reported by the engine. integrity.trustworthy = true.
